World-Class Living

Amenities
Curated for You

Artist's impression · Subject to change

Mahindra Citadel Sanctum is set on an 11-acre land parcel rising up to the 30th floor — offering a vehicle-free podium enveloped in lush greenery, with over 30 lifestyle amenities designed to elevate every day.

The Developer

Built by a
Trusted Legacy

mahindra
Lifespaces
30+
Years of Excellence
25M+
Sq.ft Delivered
NSE/BSE
Listed Company

Mahindra Lifespace Developers Ltd. is a part of the iconic Mahindra Group — one of India's most trusted conglomerates. As a pioneer in sustainable urban development, Mahindra Lifespaces has consistently delivered residences where quality of life is not just promised, but lived. Every project is a testament to their philosophy of thoughtful, future-ready design.

Sanctum at Mahindra Citadel continues this legacy — offering premium 2 & 3 BHK homes in one of Pune's fastest appreciating micro-markets. The "Home of Positive Energy" isn't just a tagline; it is the foundation upon which every Mahindra home is conceived.

RERA Compliant
Mahindra Group
Sustainable Design

Transparent Dealings
